title: Dapr Workflow
description: Represents the status and details of a Dapr workflow instance, including its runtime status, creation time, and associated properties.

instanceID.description: The unique identifier of the workflow instance.

workflowName.description: The name of the workflow definition.

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the workflow instance was created.

lastUpdatedAt.description: Timestamp of when the workflow instance was last updated.

runtimeStatus.description: The current runtime status of the workflow instance.

properties.description: Additional workflow properties as key/value pairs.
